summary: Completed comprehensive responsive design testing for THE BRIDGE travel website. Tested mobile (390px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1200px+) breakpoints. All major responsive features working correctly including navigation, grid layouts, typography scaling, and touch interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Hero CTA and contact submit buttons are 40px height, below 44px minimum for optimal touch targets

passed_tests: Mobile hero section displays correctly (390px width) - all elements visible and properly sized
Mobile menu opens and closes properly with smooth animations
Mobile navigation shows all 5 menu items and language selector
Tablet hero section displays correctly (768px width)
Experience cards: 1 column on mobile, 2 columns on tablet, 4 columns on desktop
Trip cards responsive layout working across all breakpoints
Contact form responsive: single column on mobile, 2-column grid on tablet
Footer responsive layout with proper grid columns (1/2/4 columns)
Typography scaling: 36px mobile, 72px desktop hero title
Desktop navigation visible on lg+ breakpoints (lg:flex working)
Mobile menu button properly hidden on desktop (lg:hidden working)
Language selector functionality on both mobile and desktop
Responsive breakpoint transitions smooth and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UX improvement: Increase button height to 44px minimum for hero CTA and contact submit buttons to meet touch-friendly guidelines (currently 40px)
